summary: \boxed{\text{Fetal Serum}} Key point: Peak alpha-fetoprotein occurs in fetal serum around 28-32 weeks' gestational age; this distinguishes it from higher values observed elsewhere like maternal blood which may indicate different conditions but are not maximally high there. Summary sentence emphasizing critical aspect for diagnosis and understanding normal physiology related directly back to original query regarding timing & location of maxima.
